library.title: Library
library.footerNote: Notes via Hypothes.is ¬∑ research links on desktop only
reader.blankConsult: Select a term or open a link to consult.
viewport.limitedBody: This library is designed for a wide screen: annotate, read, and consult side by side. On this device you get the book and notes only ‚Äî no research links.
viewport.hypoReload: If notes (Hypothes.is) do not appear, reload the page.
settings.title: Settings
page.about.title: About
page.about.p1: L‚àôI‚àôB‚àôR‚àôU‚àôS (short: LIBRUS) is a study library: annotate to assimilate.
page.about.p2: Three panes on a wide screen: annotate (Hypothes.is), read (book), consult (research). Notes and highlights use Hypothes.is (their account and servers). Research links open in the consult pane on wide screens; mobile is read + annotate only.
page.about.p3: Built as a static site for librus.app. Built with Grok Build.
page.contact.title: Contact
page.contact.lead: Questions, suggestions, or feedback about L‚àôI‚àôB‚àôR‚àôU‚àôS are welcome.
page.contact.p1: For project and code topics, open an issue on GitHub.
page.help.title: Help
page.help.lead: Quick start for the three-pane reader.
page.help.s1: Serve the public/ folder (npm start), not the repo root.
page.help.s2: Open a book from the library.
page.help.s3: Read in the center; annotate with Hypothesis on the left (wide) or standard sidebar (narrow).
page.help.s4: On a wide screen, select a term or click a link to consult on the right.
page.help.s5: Use Contents to jump sections; search in the main toolbar.
page.help.s6: Open Display (sliders, top right) for text size, line height, justify, and column width.
page.help.s7: On wide screens, Display also has link density and providers (globe / book).
page.help.s8: Theme and settings live on the library home. Library button always returns home.
page.help.urlBody: Query strings write through to localStorage, for example ?lang=en&theme=dark&density=hi&font=1.125&prov=w,d.
page.help.mobileBody: Narrow screens show the book and notes only ‚Äî no research links. Prefer landscape desktop for the full experience.
page.help.notesBody: Log in via Hypothes.is. Export notes from your Hypothesis account. App settings export only preferences (not annotations).
page.legal.title: Legal
page.legal.p1: Educational digital edition. Works of Sir Arthur Conan Doyle are public domain. Digital organization and this interface follow the repository license.
page.legal.p2: Annotations created with Hypothes.is belong to that service and your account ‚Äî not to L‚àôI‚àôB‚àôR‚àôU‚àôS.
page.legal.p3: Preferences (theme, language, density, typography) stay in your browser (localStorage), including values set via URL query strings. There is no L‚àôI‚àôB‚àôR‚àôU‚àôS user account on these static pages.
page.legal.p5: Rights holders: for questions or requests about content, contact me by email at sergio.shklr (at) gmail.com.
settings.poweredBy: Powered by librus.app.
settings.searchUrlsHint: Use {query} for the selected term. Leave blank for the built-in default.
settings.customProviderHint: Optional extra consult source (link icon). Needs a search URL with {query}.
settings.customIconHint: Must match a Lucide icon shipped with the app (e.g. search, book, sparkles).
